title: Roper Technologies to present at Goldman Sachs technology conference
text: SARASOTA, Fla., Aug. 29, 2023 (GLOBE NEWSWIRE) -- Roper Technologies, Inc. (Nasdaq: ROP) announced that it is presenting at the Goldman Sachs Communacopia + Technology Conference on Wednesday, September 6, 2023 at 8:10 AM (Pacific Time), at the Palace in San Francisco, CA. A link to the webcast presentation will be available in the “Investors” section of the Company's website at www.ropertech.com .

title: Roper (ROP) Acquires Syntellis Performance Solutions for $1.25B
text: Roper's (ROP) acquisition of Syntellis expands its Strata Decision Technology business and is expected to contribute around $185 million to its revenues in 2024.

title: Strata & Syntellis Coming Together to Accelerate Innovation and Deliver World-Class Service
text: CHICAGO, Aug. 08, 2023 (GLOBE NEWSWIRE) -- Strata Decision Technology (Strata), a pioneer and leader in the development of cloud-based financial planning, decision support and performance analytics solutions for healthcare, today announced that their parent company, Roper Technologies, Inc. (Nasdaq: ROP), has acquired Syntellis Performance Solutions, LLC (Syntellis) and will combine the two companies.

title: Thoma Bravo and Madison Dearborn Partners Sell Syntellis Performance Solutions to Roper Technologies
text: CHICAGO & SAN FRANCISCO--(BUSINESS WIRE)--Madison Dearborn Partners (“MDP”) and Thoma Bravo today announced that they have completed the sale of Syntellis Performance Solutions (“Syntellis”), a leading provider of enterprise performance management (EPM) software, data and intelligence solutions, to Roper Technologies, Inc. (“Roper”) (Nasdaq: ROP) in an all-cash transaction for an enterprise value of $1.4 billion. Syntellis will be combined with Roper's Strata Decision Technology business. Synte.

title: Roper Technologies has acquired Syntellis Performance Solutions
text: SARASOTA, Fla., Aug. 08, 2023 (GLOBE NEWSWIRE) -- Roper Technologies, Inc. (Nasdaq: ROP) today announced that it has completed the acquisition of Syntellis Performance Solutions for a net purchase price of $1.25 billion, including a $135 million tax benefit resulting from the transaction.

title: The 3 Best Long-Term Stocks to Buy in August
text: Stocks had a terrible 2022 and have turned things around with a tremendous 2023. While the rally is appreciated, it has left some investors feeling seasick from all the turbulence.

title: Roper Technologies Chief Executive Officer Neil Hunn Joins Deere Board of Directors
text: MOLINE, Ill. , Aug. 1, 2023 /PRNewswire/ -- Deere & Company (NYSE: DE) today announced the election of Neil Hunn to the company's board of directors.
